query_normalized: multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) because it explicitly addresses the mechanism of multimodal learning involving "tabular data" alongside other modalities (sequences, graphs, time series) and proposes a general framework for fusing these specific data types, which is directly relevant to the user's question about benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and image.
